issue.title: Retire transport inline raw adapter bodies

artifacts.role: WordPress-profile transport adapters rendering compiler-owned templates
compiler-owned bounded WP_Http::_get_first_available_transport public adapter template
compiler-owned bounded WP_Http::_dispatch_request private adapter template
runner requiring adapter template provenance before accepting WPHX-312.66 generated shell
candidate manifest recording transport adapter template shape checks
public-shell snapshots regenerated with transport adapter template manifest fields

claims: The bounded WP_Http transport-selection and dispatch adapter bodies no longer live as inline Haxe string concatenation.
The WPHX-312.66 runner requires template path, hash, placeholder list, ownership, and upstream reference evidence for both generated transport shell bodies.
WphxPhpWordPressAdapters.hx now uses PhpRawBlock only for rendered template bodies, not inline WordPress-profile PHP source bodies.
non_claims: This does not claim full WP_Http transport dispatch ownership or whole-file WP_Http ownership.
This does not claim live cURL/streams/Requests network I/O, DNS/proxy/TLS behavior, or installed WordPress distribution behavior.
This does not claim WPHX PHP is a complete arbitrary-Haxe PHP backend.
